who: accounting firms processing 10–20 vendor tax forms/quarter
offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 vendor tax forms/quarter, manual collection causes delays in tax submissions. We simplify the collection and formatting instead of manual methods.
problem: Manual collection and formatting of vendor tax forms is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Share in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try template formatting and reminder notifications on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
